topics.title: Berlin District Battle
topics.lead: Pick the Berlin neighborhood energy you would rather spend a day inside.
topics.resultFallback: You picked the Berlin neighborhood energy that feels most like your kind of day.
topics.gamePrompt: Pick the neighborhood mood you would rather wander through right now.

items.name: Mitte
items.line: Big sights, museum stops and first Berlin impressions.
items.resultLine: You chose the classic Berlin opening chapter: landmarks, museums and a lot of context in one walk.

items.name: Kreuzberg
items.line: Canals, street food, murals and late corners.
items.resultLine: You like Berlin when it feels layered, loud, political and full of street-level life.

items.name: Friedrichshain
items.line: East-side energy, bars and warehouse edges.
items.resultLine: You picked the side of Berlin that keeps moving after sunset and still carries its post-wall texture.

items.name: Neukölln
items.line: Markets, canals, cafes and restless change.
items.resultLine: You chose Berlin at its most mixed: everyday life, creative pressure and a little beautiful chaos.

items.name: Prenzlauer Berg
items.line: Leafy streets, Sunday markets and cafe pauses.
items.resultLine: You like Berlin when it softens: old streets, long brunches and calm corners with history underneath.

items.name: Charlottenburg
items.line: Old west elegance, museums and broad avenues.
items.resultLine: You picked the polished Berlin mood: grand streets, culture stops and a little old-west confidence.

items.name: Schöneberg
items.line: Queer history, local squares and grown-up nights.
items.resultLine: You chose a Berlin with character: quietly iconic, socially layered and comfortable in itself.

items.name: Wedding
items.line: Canals, snack counters and underrated grit.
items.resultLine: You like the Berlin that does not perform for visitors and is better because of it.

items.name: Moabit
items.line: Island feeling, markets and quiet local routes.
items.resultLine: You chose a Berlin that sits between everything: practical, local and easy to underestimate.

items.name: Tiergarten
items.line: Green space between monuments and museums.
items.resultLine: You picked the breathing space of the city: park paths, big history and room to slow down.

items.name: Tempelhof
items.line: Runway walks, big skies and Berlin scale.
items.resultLine: You like Berlin when the city suddenly opens wide and turns history into public space.

items.name: Köpenick
items.line: Water, old town corners and a slower day.
items.resultLine: You chose the river-and-lake version of Berlin: calmer, greener and further from the rush.

items.name: Spandau
items.line: Citadel mood, old streets and western edges.
items.resultLine: You picked the Berlin that feels like its own town, with fortress energy and a longer memory.

items.name: Pankow
items.line: Leafy north Berlin with villas and village traces.
items.resultLine: You like Berlin when it turns residential, green and quietly full of old layers.

items.name: Lichtenberg
items.line: Trams, wide streets and east Berlin edges.
items.resultLine: You chose the less-obvious Berlin: everyday east-side texture and plenty still being rewritten.

items.name: Treptow
items.line: River paths, parks and after-work space.
items.resultLine: You picked a Berlin that follows the water: open, relaxed and built for long wandering.

topics.title: Berlin Museum Battle
topics.lead: A playful museum bracket for culture-heavy Berlin days.
topics.resultFallback: You picked the museum that feels most like your Berlin culture day.
topics.gamePrompt: Pick the museum you would rather visit first on a culture-heavy Berlin day.

items.name: Neues Museum
items.line: Ancient worlds, Nefertiti and rebuilt ruins.
items.resultLine: You chose the museum where Berlin's broken and rebuilt story meets the ancient world.

items.name: Altes Museum
items.line: Classical calm at the front of Museum Island.
items.resultLine: You picked the graceful museum mood: columns, antiquity and a very composed Berlin day.

items.name: Alte Nationalgalerie
items.line: Paintings, staircases and old-world drama.
items.resultLine: You chose art with a grand staircase feeling: romantic, elegant and a little theatrical.

items.name: Bode-Museum
items.line: Sculpture, domes and river-island presence.
items.resultLine: You picked the museum that feels like a stage set on the water: sculptural, formal and cinematic.

items.name: Humboldt Forum
items.line: Global collections inside a debated palace shell.
items.resultLine: You chose the complicated Berlin museum: huge, global, central and impossible to discuss simply.

items.name: Jewish Museum Berlin
items.line: Architecture, memory and deep emotional weight.
items.resultLine: You picked a museum that asks for attention, not just viewing: architecture, absence and memory.

items.name: Berlinische Galerie
items.line: Modern art with Berlin as the main character.
items.resultLine: You chose Berlin looking at itself: art, photography, city identity and sharp local angles.

items.name: Hamburger Bahnhof
items.line: Contemporary art inside a former station.
items.resultLine: You picked the big contemporary mood: spacious, experimental and a little unpredictable.

items.name: Gemäldegalerie
items.line: Old masters without the Museum Island crush.
items.resultLine: You chose the quiet art-lover's answer: fewer crowds, serious paintings and time to look.

items.name: DDR Museum
items.line: Hands-on everyday life behind the Wall.
items.resultLine: You picked the interactive history route: objects, habits and the texture of daily life.

items.name: Topography of Terror
items.line: Documentation, warning and hard history.
items.resultLine: You chose the sober Berlin history stop: direct, documentary and necessary.

items.name: Museum für Naturkunde
items.line: Dinosaurs, science and wide-eyed curiosity.
items.resultLine: You picked the curiosity museum: fossils, science and the kind of wonder that works at any age.

items.name: Deutsches Technikmuseum
items.line: Planes, trains and machines with Berlin scale.
items.resultLine: You chose the hands-on machine mood: big objects, transport stories and engineering detail.

items.name: Futurium
items.line: Future questions in a clean riverfront shell.
items.resultLine: You picked Berlin looking forward: ideas, choices and bright what-if energy.

items.name: Urban Nation
items.line: Street art, murals and contemporary city color.
items.resultLine: You chose the museum that keeps one foot on the street: visual, graphic and very urban.

items.name: Museum for Communication
items.line: Messages, media and how people connect.
items.resultLine: You picked the museum of signals: playful, clever and all about how people reach each other.

topics.title: Berlin Night Battle
topics.lead: A nightlife bracket built around mood, not official rankings.
topics.resultFallback: You picked the night-out mood that feels most like your Berlin.
topics.gamePrompt: Pick the Berlin night-out mood you would rather follow tonight.

items.name: Techno Warehouse
items.line: Dark rooms, heavy sound and no rush home.
items.resultLine: You chose the classic Berlin night myth: bass, patience and a room that feels outside normal time.

items.name: Riverside Club
items.line: Water, lights and a softer edge to the night.
items.resultLine: You picked the night where Berlin reflects on the water and the party feels a little lighter.

items.name: Queer Dancefloor
items.line: Expressive, open and built around belonging.
items.resultLine: You chose the dancefloor as a social space: expressive, protective and full of chosen-family energy.

items.name: Punk Show
items.line: Small stage, loud room, no polish required.
items.resultLine: You picked the rougher Berlin night: guitars, basement heat and a room that does not care about perfect.

items.name: Jazz Cellar
items.line: Low light, live sound and close tables.
items.resultLine: You chose the intimate night: musicians close by, lights low and conversation after the last note.

items.name: Open-Air Rave
items.line: Summer air, park edges and sunrise plans.
items.resultLine: You picked the Berlin night that wants fresh air, loose plans and a long way home.

items.name: Karaoke Bar
items.line: No shame, bad choruses and instant friends.
items.resultLine: You chose the night where confidence matters more than pitch and strangers become backing singers.

items.name: Kneipe Crawl
items.line: Local bars, wooden tables and one more stop.
items.resultLine: You picked the Berlin pub crawl mood: low-key, talkative and better without a strict plan.

items.name: Späti Corner
items.line: Cheap drinks, pavement talks and late snacks.
items.resultLine: You chose Berlin's informal living room: a bottle, a corner and the night happening around you.

items.name: Cocktail Bar
items.line: Dim lights, clean glassware and slow starts.
items.resultLine: You picked the polished night: one good drink, good lighting and no need to shout.

items.name: Rooftop Sunset
items.line: Skyline, golden hour and a soft landing.
items.resultLine: You chose the Berlin night that begins above the city before deciding where to go next.

items.name: Comedy Night
items.line: Basement laughs, small stages and sharp turns.
items.resultLine: You picked the social night: low stakes, quick laughs and a room that warms up fast.

items.name: Late Döner Stop
items.line: The real final boss of many Berlin nights.
items.resultLine: You know the night is not complete until there is sauce, salad and a glowing snack counter.

items.name: Night Bus Ride
items.line: Window reflections and the long route home.
items.resultLine: You chose the cinematic ending: headphones, city lights and a bus that shows you another Berlin.

items.name: Gallery Opening
items.line: White walls, cheap wine and art-world orbit.
items.resultLine: You picked the art-night version of Berlin: looking, talking and pretending not to network.

items.name: Afterhours Breakfast
items.line: Coffee, pastry and daylight after a long night.
items.resultLine: You chose the sunrise epilogue: tired, happy and suddenly very grateful for breakfast.
